creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 246082
py-django-filer-3.1.0.patch

Hi,

attached is a patch that updates www/py-django-filer to 3.1.0.

Changes to the port:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
- Introduce default option HEIF to reflect the settings as given in setup.py
- Remove no longer required patch


QA:
~~~
- poudriere -> OK (12.4-RELEASE amd64 for py38, py39, py310 and py311)
